creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231954
py-django-dpaste-3.5.patch

Hi Kubilay,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-dpaste to 3.5 and make it ready for Django 3.x .

Further changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Limit to Python <= 3.10 as the test suite fails with Python 3.11
- Modernize test suite
- Update WWW field as the upstream repository got a new maintainer

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.2-RELEASE amd64, py36, py37, py38, py39, py310)

Results via "make test":
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

With Django 2.2 and Python 3.6-3.9:
> 50 passed in N.NN seconds

With Django 2.2 and Python 3.10 (with a local Pytest 7.0.1)
> 50 passed, 1 warning in N.NNs 

With Django 3.2 and Python 3.6-3.10 (Note: The dependency www/py-django-csp needs also to be switched to Django 3.2 in that case.):
> 50 passed, 10 warnings in N.NN seconds
